name: Purvé Donut Stop
tagline: Small-batch Hawaiian-flavored donuts that sell out by mid-morning — ube, lilikoi, haupia, and rotating seasonal specials.
mustOrder: ube donut — purple yam glaze, iconic
lilikoi donut — tart and sweet passionfruit
parking: Street parking on Waialae Ave; Kahala Mall parking nearby
talkStory: Tiny Kaimuki donut shop on Waialae Ave with a 4.9 Google rating — one of the highest-rated food spots on Oahu. Everything is small-batch and made fresh daily with Hawaiian flavors. They sell out early, especially weekends — arrive by 7am to get the full selection. Leonard's has malasadas covered; Purvé is the donut move. Opens at 6am.
